narrative:
Cols 31-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 475 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.8 percentage points.
